studios.name: Homa Games

studios.outreach_angle: Unity + AI integration for rapid hyper-casual development - AI infrastructure that lives natively in Unity workflows. White-box approach perfect for AI tools.

studios.outreach_angle: Live ops automation - Rollic's Zynga backing means enterprise-grade live ops perfect for AI automation. 8 #1/#2 US App Store hits.

studios.name: Amanotes

studios.qualification_notes: Too small (<10 employees); Low downloads and small team
studios.outreach_angle: AI-driven personalization - Scopely's match-3 games have deep economies. AI personalization for difficulty curves and offers could boost retention. Now #1 mobile games company in US.
